Episodes.Title: Inbô
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Aya Hisakawa, Ryô Horikawa
Episodes.Plot: A giant castle in a mysterious world. Two shady Majin, Gomah and Degesu, watch a monitor. The monitor shows Goku and the others having a fierce battle against Majin Buu. Gomah and Degesu head to Earth to execute a certain conspiracy.

Episodes.Title: Gurorio
Episodes.Director: Yoshitaka Yashima, Kazuya Karasawa, Aya Komaki
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Yumiko Kobayashi, Kôki Uchiyama
Episodes.Plot: Goku and his friends have been turned small due to Gomah's scheme. They begin preparing to go to the demon world. Goku collects his Nyoibo and looks forward to a new adventure. Then the mysterious young Majin Glorio appears.

Episodes.Title: Inazuma
Episodes.Director: Yoshitaka Yashima, Aya Komaki, Gaku Yano
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Yumiko Kobayashi, Kôki Uchiyama
Episodes.Plot: The plane crash lands to the ground below. Fortunately for the group there was no major damage, and they just needed to lighten the ship's load, leaving behind half of the supplies. As Panzy gives the ship a once-over, she recalls...

Episodes.Title: Kubiwa
Episodes.Actors: Nasim Benelkour, Paul Castro Jr., Nia Celeste

Episodes.Title: Tamagami
Episodes.Director: Yoshitaka Yashima, Kazuya Karasawa, Aya Komaki
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Yumiko Kobayashi, Kôki Uchiyama
Episodes.Plot: As Goku's battle against Tamagami of the Third Deamon World unfolds, Dr. Arinsu's true plan in creating another Majin Buu is revealed.

Episodes.Title: Touzoku
Episodes.Director: Yoshitaka Yashima, Takao Kiriyama, Aya Komaki
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Yumiko Kobayashi, Kôki Uchiyama
Episodes.Plot: Rumors of what Goku did in the Third Demon World spread across the Demon Realm. To avoid trouble, Goku wears a disguise at the hotel, but they can't let their guard down in the Third Demon World. Thieves see through his disguise.

Episodes.Title: Unabara
Episodes.Director: Yoshitaka Yashima, Aya Komaki, Kan Murakami
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Yumiko Kobayashi, Kôki Uchiyama
Episodes.Plot: Goku and his companions arrive at the mystic Second Demon World where a giant ocean spreads as far as the eye can see! The party is amazed at the new world, but are immediately attacked by Gendarmerie that have been sent by Gomah!

Episodes.Title: Densetsu
Episodes.Director: Yoshitaka Yashima, Aya Komaki, Yuichi Tsuzuki
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Yumiko Kobayashi, Kôki Uchiyama
Episodes.Plot: Having regrouped with Vegeta and the others, Goku and his companions arrive at a planet that seems familiar. As they move to head out, a suspicious shadow approaches. It's the Legendary Namek who remained alone in the Demon Realm.

Episodes.Title: Sokojikara
Episodes.Director: Yoshitaka Yashima, Kazuya Karasawa, Aya Komaki
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Yumiko Kobayashi, Kôki Uchiyama
Episodes.Plot: Vegeta’s battle with the Tamagami is evenly matched, but forced underwater where he's not used to fighting, he finds himself struggling! Vegeta is cornered and sinks to the ocean floor. But then he finally unleashes his true stren...

Episodes.Title: Sapuraizu
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Yumiko Kobayashi, Kôki Uchiyama
Episodes.Plot: As Goku and his companions head to where Gomah is, engine trouble causes them to land on a certain planet. The place they land happens to be a surprise-filled planet where even Supreme Demon Kings are afraid to tread.

Episodes.Title: Taboo
Episodes.Plot: To stop Goku's advancement, Gomah commits an unbelievable taboo! Goku and his companions can no longer proceed. Just when it seems their adventure is over, a certain someone reveals their true power!

Episodes.Title: Degesu
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Yumiko Kobayashi, Kôki Uchiyama

Episodes.Title: Gomah
Episodes.Director: Yoshitaka Yashima, Kazuya Karasawa, Aya Komaki
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Yumiko Kobayashi, Kôki Uchiyama
Episodes.Plot: During an epic fight between Goku and his companions against Arinsu, the sudden appearance of King Gomah in transformed form complicates the situation, threatening both factions in the field.

Episodes.Title: Mezame
Episodes.Director: Yoshitaka Yashima, Aya Komaki, Kan Murakami
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Yumiko Kobayashi, Kôki Uchiyama
Episodes.Plot: King Gomah arrives, sparking a fierce battle. Goku's group faces the Third Eye's might. In a desperate moment, Goku discovers an incredible new power within himself.

Episodes.Title: Uragiri
Episodes.Director: Yoshitaka Yashima, Kazuya Karasawa, Aya Komaki
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Aya Hisakawa, Ryô Horikawa
Episodes.Plot: The battle continues to go poorly for Goku and his companions. After much hesitation, Glorio puts Arinsu's secret plan into action. As his friends watch in awe, what will Glorio's betrayal set in motion?

Episodes.Title: Zenkai
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Aya Hisakawa, Ryô Horikawa
Episodes.Plot: Having been restored, Goku finally surpasses his limits. To defeat the mighty Giant Gomah, who keeps regenerating through the power of the Third Eye, everyone puts in their maximum effort in an all-out battle.
